dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: ..and thats when King Bach pulls out a comically large spoo-

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: Shh wait, hun, isn’t that those two twins that we saved from that orchestra a few months ago!?

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: Let’s go say hi to them!!

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Greetings and salutations, dear BF and GF!

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: beep bop

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Oh? What are we doing? Well, since the hall is currently being renovated, we've decided to continue our singing out in the streets! And what better way to celebrate the holiday season than to carol at the mall!

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: bap!!

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: That's such a sweet idea! By the way, where’d you get those new clothes?

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: These? Jewel helped picked these outfits! Neat huh?

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Yeah but is the tail really necessary

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Aww but ya look cute as a little reindeer~!

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: D-Don’t rub it in-

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: bop beep

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: Whats that bebs? You wanna join them?

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Hmm, I guess we still have time for one song so-

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Let’s see how much you’ve improved since we last saw each other!!

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Hehe, indubitably.

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Well your Height hasn't changed since

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Oh! You can stand on this box, that way we can look at each other easily!

dialogue.speaker: gfbf-speakers
text: Beep boo!

dialogue.speaker: twinsxmas-speakers
text: Now then, Tis the season!
